opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I have absolutely no energy to even get out of this chair, I keep having these intense hot flushes, and I feel completely empty and depressed.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Over the last day I just collapsed into myself — I can't do anything, my spouse had to make my meals, and the hot flushes and low mood have gotten unbearable.

symptom_narrative.onset: started creeping up over about the last six months, but it crashed today
symptom_narrative.duration: six months of gradual decline, much worse in the last couple of weeks
symptom_narrative.character: no energy at all, flat and empty, can't concentrate, and these sudden intense hot flushes that come several times a day
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it's ever been — I can barely move from the chair
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over, it's my whole body and my mood
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: there most of the time now; the hot flushes come in sudden waves
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: just seems to keep getting worse on its own
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've noticed my muscles feel weaker and smaller, and I've completely lost interest in sex
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this before — this is new over the last half year
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: chair-bound today, relying on my spouse for meals, and it's putting a real strain on our marriage

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: barely able to move at the moment; normally not very active
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: married, spouse is here and very worried; the loss of interest in intimacy and the mood changes are straining the relationship

communication_style.typical_message_style: short, low-energy replies; the spouse fills in details

reluctance_topics: low mood and thoughts about the future

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own estimate, not a measured weight

objective_data_offered.value: spouse says he looks like he's lost the hair under his arms and around his groin over the past while
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: spouse's observation, not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: spouse says he looks exhausted and flat, has hardly moved from the chair all day, and isn't his usual self
patient reports sudden hot flushes several times a day over the last two weeks
